criteria: 1M+ views (plays or views); a REAL person in an interview/podcast/keynote/conference talking about AI (its value, risks, disruption, or their own adoption) in ANY industry — the speaker need NOT be an AI or tech figure, any well-known speaker in any field counts; NOT already posted on @theaibolt (dedup by speaker+topic vs full history); duration preferred 30-90s but longer viral clips OK (cut at edit); recent preferred but evergreen older 1M+ clips accepted (age flagged). EXCLUDE AI-generated/CGI video, memes, faceless voiceover, text-overlay news, no-speaker demos.
status: 2026-07-24 run #4: theaibolt full-history resweep (200-limit, 143/142 items) - zero new posts, zero pruning needed. theaiaxon dedup (STEP 1b): Apify published-reels scrape still shows only the 1 known reel (Sam Altman/Tucker Carlson, tracked in theaiaxon_published_exclusions), Metricool getScheduledPosts (brandId 6566296, -30/+30 day window) returned 0 scheduled. Clean, both checks succeeded (no errors). Discovery: 4 parallel subagent lanes (X-search Tier2/3 AI researchers/execs; X-search cross-industry non-tech AI voices; Instagram mega-podcast recency check across 13 accounts; X-search finance/entertainment figures). Mega-podcast IG lane found zero new qualifiers (confirms 2026-07-09 exhaustion finding still holds; also flagged 3 broken/renamed handles: @tferriss->@timferriss, @modernwisdompodcast->@chriswillx, @nikhilkamathofficial->@nikhilkamathcio, all checked but empty; @20vc remains unresolvable after 5 handle variants). X search lanes were the productive lever again: +10 available, +1 review (Snoop Dogg, 1,001,550 views - right at the gate and AI is a secondary angle to a Drake/Kendrick beef story, flagged for user call). New speakers: Sam Altman (3 distinct topics, none overlapping the already-published Tucker Carlson teen-safety clip), Stuart Russell, Ray Dalio (full ~42min episode, needs a cut), Larry Fink, Cathie Wood, Jamie Dimon, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (first-ever non-CEO/non-researcher political figure - AI data center environmental impact angle), Connor Leahy. Several named-target searches came back empty and are noted as tried-and-empty rather than silently dropped: Gary Marcus, Kai-Fu Lee, Fei-Fei Li, Timnit Gebru, Eliezer Yudkowsky, Jan Leike, Jared Kaplan, Chris Olah, Emad Mostaque, Percy Liang, Arthur Mensch, Clement Delangue, Aidan Gomez, Noam Shazeer, Reid Hoffman, Vinod Khosla, Satya Nadella, Sundar Pichai (researchers/execs lane); Grimes, will.i.am, Drake, Timbaland, Scarlett Johansson, LeBron James, Steph Curry, Trevor Noah, Jon Stewart, Gordon Ramsay, Neil deGrasse Tyson, Mark Cuban (2 tweets found but link-card format, no video, excluded on FORMAT gate) (cross-industry lane); Raoul Pal, Chamath Palihapitiya (found but only 143K views), Michael Burry (found but all narrator/text-card videos, not on-camera, excluded on FORMAT gate), Jim Cramer, Warren Buffett, Arnold Schwarzenegger, MrBeast, Oprah Winfrey (finance/entertainment lane). Available now 59/100 (was 49), review 8. No Apify quota errors across any of the 4 lanes. Cross-industry non-tech-CEO 1M+ content remains genuinely scarce outside politics/finance; recommend next run try direct speaker-name IG searches for the newly-found X-only speakers (Stuart Russell, Ray Dalio, Larry Fink, Cathie Wood) in case a native IG-hosted version exists, and revisit world-leader AI-summit clips (Macron, Xi Jinping) which had relevant content just under the 1M bar.
